'''鈭歴-j-ch-m''' ('''kasajchemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jounce|jounce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jounce|jounce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-j-ch-m
|-
! Lemma
| kasajchemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisajchemoko|thisajchemoko]] || [[word:jisajchemoko|jisajchemoko]] || [[word:shisajchemoko|shisajchemoko]] || [[word:kisajchemoko|kisajchemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusajchemoko|thuthusajchemoko]] || [[word:jujusajchemoko|jujusajchemoko]] || [[word:shushusajchemoko|shushusajchemoko]] || [[word:kukusajchemoko|kukusajchemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosajchemoko|thosajchemoko]] || [[word:josajchemoko|josajchemoko]] || [[word:shosajchemoko|shosajchemoko]] || [[word:kosajchemoko|kosajchemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sajchemoko|th忙sajchemoko]] || [[word:j忙sajchemoko|j忙sajchemoko]] || [[word:sh忙sajchemoko|sh忙sajchemoko]] || [[word:k忙sajchemoko|k忙sajchemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
